recommendations.title: The End?
recommendations.overview: A businessman gets stuck in his office elevator, but this nuisance soon turns into a nightmare, for in the outside world a zombie apocalypse has taken place...

recommendations.title: Night of the Living Deb
recommendations.overview: After a one night stand Deb wakes up in the middle of a zombie apocalypse.

recommendations.title: Cockneys vs Zombies
recommendations.overview: A group of Cockneys arm themselves to rescue their elderly relative and his retirement home friends who are trapped and fighting off a zombie attack during a zombie apocalypse in the East End of London.

recommendations.title: Zoo
recommendations.overview: A couple trying to save their marriage during a zombie apocalypse.

recommendations.title: The Wasp Woman
recommendations.overview: The head of a major cosmetics company experiments on herself with a youth formula made from royal jelly extracted from wasps, but the formula's side effects have deadly consequences.

recommendations.title: Zombeavers
recommendations.overview: College friends find their weekend of sex and debauchery ruined when deadly zombie beavers swarm their riverside cabin.

recommendations.title: Sabrina
recommendations.overview: A toy manufacturer and his wife are terrorized by a demon after their orphaned niece tries to call her late mother's spirit.

recommendations.title: Inbred
recommendations.overview: Four young offenders and their workers spend a weekend in the remote Yorkshire village of Mortlake, which prides on keeping itself to itself. A minor incident with locals rapidly escalates into a blood-soaked, deliriously warped nightmare.

recommendations.title: MexZombies
recommendations.overview: A group of teenagers must face a zombie apocalypse, and help reestablish order.

recommendations.title: Highway to Hell
recommendations.overview: Charlie and Rachel run away from home to get married in Las Vegas. But they get attacked by a zombie who takes Rachel with him to hell, where she will become one of Satan's brides.
